headline: Assessing Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot and what it might mean for Kraft Heinz (KHC) Kraft Heinz (KHC) has attracted attention after a mixed run in the stock, with a gain over the past month but declines over the past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. For investors tracking shorter term moves, the stock slipped about 0.3% over the past day and roughly 0.4% over the past week. Over the past month it rose about 3.6%, yet over the past 3 months it fell about 2.8% and is down about 4.6% year to...

headline: Hormel Foods: Near 6% Yield Looks Tasty, But Hot Inflation Remains A Key Risk
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation faces inflation pressure, but a low forward P/E and ~6% yield may appeal to income investors. Click for this HRL update.
